rule_metadata.author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Regsvr32 Execution From Remote Share

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Regsvr32 Execution From Remote Share
id: 88a87a10-384b-4ad7-8871-2f9bf9259ce5
status: test
description: Detects REGSVR32.exe to execute DLL hosted on remote shares
references:
- https://thedfirreport.com/2022/10/31/follina-exploit-leads-to-domain-compromise/
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
date: 2022-10-31
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1218.010
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_img:
  - Image|endswith: \regsvr32.exe
  - OriginalFileName: \REGSVR32.EXE
  selection_cli:
    CommandLine|contains: ' \\\\'
  condition: all of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
